extraction.one_line_summary: WOODS Mike won Stage 2 uphill sprint at Tour des Alpes Maritimes et du Var with 522W for 2:35 at 62kg, but lost overall by 5 seconds to BRAMBILA's breakaway.
tactical_patterns: Woods produced 522W for 2:35 at 62kg to win uphill sprint but Trek's Brambila won GC via earlier breakaway control.

rider_signals.WOODS Mike: positive: Won stage with exceptional power (590W peak 1min) but tactical error allowed weaker breakaway rider to steal GC
rider_signals.BRAMBILA Gianluca: positive: First win in 4+ years, took GC by 5 seconds over stronger rider through breakaway positioning
rider_signals.MOLOMAR: neutral: Lost yellow jersey by 1 second after winning opening stage for Trek Segafredo
